title: KADAX Flower Pot, Ceramic Plant Pot in 2 Colour Variations, Planter with Decorative Embossings, Ceramic Planter, Plant Pot for Indoor Plants (12 cm, Grey)
features: Impressive: the Pokka planter from KADAX is available in two unusual variants. The first model combines the white upper part with a marble-like lower part. The other model is characterised by a white base with a dark grey rounding.
Resistant: the Pokka flower pot is made from a high-quality ceramic. Thanks to its properties, it is resistant to damage
Functional: the plant pot is suitable for both large and smaller seedlings. We have four sizes: 12, 14, 16 or 17 x 9 cm.
Universal: thanks to its classic round shape and timeless colours, the planter adapts well to any decor. The neutral tones of both models bring out any plant beautifully.
Practical: both colour variations of the high-quality Pokka pot have been decorated with fine vertical embossing. They are flat enough not to complicate cleaning.
description: The high-quality ceramic planter Pokka brings out your indoor plants excellently. The robust pot is resistant to everyday damage or dirt. Simply wipe it with a damp cloth to keep it clean despite the decorative embossing. This is sure to be appreciated by the inhabitants of small apartments, where decorations easily catch the dust. The Pokka flower pot combines the timeless classic with the strong modern trends. You have two colour variations to choose from - both models are oval shaped with a universal colour. The first model predominates white with a marble-like base. The other model is deep grey with a white base. This design adapts to any style and brings out the colours of the plant impressively. The planter is made entirely of high quality ceramic that can be easily cleaned. It has no superfluous details that could trap dust. The wavy embossing is deep enough to wipe with a rag. Are you looking for an interesting gift for flower lovers? Or maybe you want an impressive home decor that is always in? The solution is at hand - choose our Vario planter now!
